headline: Tesla Robotaxi Expansion And Global Sales Rebound Test Long Term Thesis
summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has expanded its unsupervised robotaxi service to cover the entire Austin metropolitan area. The company reports a rebound in vehicle sales, with higher registrations in Europe, Japan, and China for May compared with prior months. These updates arrive alongside earlier reports of declining registrations in several of those regions, indicating a shift in recent monthly trends. Tesla operates across electric vehicles, autonomous driving, and energy products. A broader...

headline: How skeptical should investors be of these mega-IPOs?
summary: As markets (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) prepare for the public launch of SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) on June 12, should investors be skeptical of these mega-IPOs expected to sweep Wall Street? 9i Capital Group founder and CEO Kevin Thompson cites the circular investing occurring between Big Tech names and these pre-IPO companies — SpaceX, OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT). OpenAI and Anthropic have also filed to go public in 2026.

content.title: How skeptical should investors be of these mega-IPOs?
content.description:
As markets (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) prepare for the public launch of SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) on June 12, should investors be skeptical of these mega-IPOs expected to sweep Wall Street?

9i Capital Group founder and CEO Kevin Thompson cites the circular investing occurring between Big Tech names and these pre-IPO companies — SpaceX, OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT).

OpenAI and Anthropic have also filed to go public in 2026.
content.summary: As markets (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) prepare for the public launch of SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) on June 12, should investors be skeptical of these mega-IPOs expected to sweep Wall Street? 9i Capital Group founder and CEO Kevin Thompson cites the circular investing occurring between Big Tech names and these pre-IPO companies — SpaceX, OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT). OpenAI and Anthropic have also filed to go public in 2026.

headline: Lemonade Tests Tesla Usage Based Auto Cover As Losses Remain A Focus
summary: Lemonade (NYSE:LMND) introduced autonomous car insurance for Tesla owners in Indiana. The product is tailored to Tesla drivers using Full Self Driving technology. Pricing is usage based, with potential cost savings tied to how often Full Self Driving is used. Lemonade, known for its app based renters, homeowners and pet insurance, is expanding further into auto coverage with a focus on Tesla drivers in Indiana. By tying pricing to Full Self Driving usage, the company is using connected car...

headline: Prediction: Tesla Stock Will Hit $500 on This Date
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) sits in an awkward place. headline: Elon Musk’s $1.8 Trillion SpaceX IPO Is Too Big to Succeed
summary: The  SpaceX  initial public offering is one of a kind; the investment opportunity is not.  SpaceX’s IPO is arguably the biggest capital-markets event ever, and unique.  SpaceX’s singularity will continue when it starts trading, with the company added to the  just 15 trading days after the offering, requiring passive buying of 10% to 15% of the shares outstanding, and a massive amount of retail participation in the IPO.

headline: This Trump-backed drone company is competing directly with China
summary: Based in the US, Unusual Machines (UMAC) manufacturers first person view (FPV) drones and parts for other drone developers. President Trump's son, Donald Jr., sits on the company's board and is a prominent shareholder. Unusual Machines CEO Allan Evans comes on Asking for a Trend to discuss China's market share in manufacturing drone components and the "bigger spotlight" the Trump family's investments has created for the company to succeed in.

content.title: This Trump-backed drone company is competing directly with China
content.description:
Based in the US, Unusual Machines (UMAC) manufacturers first person view (FPV) drones and parts for other drone developers. President Trump's son, Donald Jr., sits on the company's board and is a prominent shareholder.

Unusual Machines CEO Allan Evans comes on Asking for a Trend to discuss China's market share in manufacturing drone components and the "bigger spotlight" the Trump family's investments has created for the company to succeed in.

headline: Don't expect to see SpaceX on the S&P 500 so soon after IPO
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices stated that it will not be changing its rules to fast-track SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) and other mega-IPOs into the S&P 500 index (^GSPC). Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Vanity Fair contributing editor Bethany McLean discuss SpaceX's valuation in the lead up to the space company's public launch a week from now. JPMorgan Chase (JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon hosted Elon Musk as part of SpaceX's (SPAX.PVT) pre-IPO roadshow, as the company sets its sights on an IPO price of $135 per share next Friday, June 12.

content.title: Don't expect to see SpaceX on the S&P 500 so soon after IPO

S&P Dow Jones Indices stated that it will not be changing its rules to fast-track SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) and other mega-IPOs into the S&P 500 index (^GSPC).

JPMorgan Chase (JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon hosted Elon Musk as part of SpaceX's (SPAX.PVT) pre-IPO roadshow, as the company sets its sights on an IPO price of $135 per share next Friday, June 12.
